changes: Improved chat memory reliability by keeping agent session identity in the local runtime kernel instead of app-side caches
Floating agent pills now project from canonical kernel runs (spawn_agent, list_agent_sessions, attention overrides) instead of a separate pill lifecycle
Push-to-talk and typed chat now share one kernel conversation history, so follow-up questions stay in context after voice turns
Fixed voice push-to-talk missing recent floating-bar typed messages by sharing one main chat transcript
Fixed typed chat not seeing recent voice turns when continuing in the same session
Agent artifact cards in chat now survive app restarts and show when the file was deleted or moved
Hide agent tooling folders like .claude from artifact pills so only real outputs appear
Dismiss failed or stopped floating agent pills from the status badge, and attach files to pill chats by dragging them onto the input
Fixed push-to-talk and main chat so they remember what you just asked in the floating Omi pill, including background agent spawns
Fixed push-to-talk going silent after a typed message when the voice session reconnects for updated context
